description: An accounting manager needs to draft the Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) section for the quarterly 10-Q filing.

nodes.task_description: Gather financial statements and variance reports for the quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the income statement, balance sheet, and budget vs. actual reports.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the financial results and identify key trends and drivers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that revenue growth was driven by a new product launch.

nodes.task_description: Draft a narrative for the MD&A section explaining the quarterly performance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a draft of the MD&A section incorporating the key findings.
